raw_text:
Prism UI Labs

Building the future of accessible, high-performance web experiences

Now Hiring: Manager, Frontend Engineering

San Francisco, CA (Hybrid) · Full-time · $210,000 - $270,000 USD

W

e're seeking an experienced Manager of Frontend Engineering to lead and grow our frontend team. You'll

oversee a team of 5-8 talented engineers, guide architectural decisions, and drive the technical vision for our

React-based design system platform. In this role, you'll balance hands-on technical contributions with people

leadership, mentoring, and strategic planning. Ideal candidates bring 6+ years of experience including significant

people management, strong expertise in modern frontend technologies, and a proven track record of building high-
performing teams.

A B O U T U S

Prism UI Labs is a forward-thinking SaaS company specializing in design systems and component libraries for

enterprise applications. We serve Fortune 500 companies and innovative startups alike, providing the

infrastructure needed to build scalable, accessible web interfaces. Our team is passionate about performance

optimization, accessibility standards, and developer experience.

Y O U R R O L E

Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 5-8 frontend engineers, conducting regular 1-on-1s, performance reviews,
and career development planning

Design and implement team technical roadmap, prioritizing feature development, refactoring efforts, and

performance optimization initiatives across React and Next.js applications

Architect scalable frontend solutions for complex UI challenges, establishing best practices for TypeScript,

accessibility (WCAG 2.1), and web performance standards

Oversee code quality and engineering standards, reviewing architecture decisions and ensuring team follows

established patterns for component development with React and Tailwind CSS

Collaborate with product, design, and backend teams to define requirements and deliver customer-facing

features; represent the frontend team in cross-functional planning

Manage hiring and onboarding for the frontend team, defining skill requirements and conducting technical

interviews for React and TypeScript expertise

Champion web performance and accessibility initiatives, implementing automated testing with tools like

Lighthouse CI and accessibility linting across the codebase

 Contribute hands-on technical work on high-impact projects, particularly in areas requiring architectural

expertise (e.g., design system evolution, build optimization with Vite)

Drive knowledge sharing through tech talks, documentation, and mentoring on advanced frontend concepts like
concurrent rendering, component composition, and performance profiling

R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

6+ years of professional frontend development experience, with at least 2+ years in a people management or

technical leadership role

Expert-level proficiency in React and TypeScript, with strong understanding of component patterns, hooks, and

state management

Demonstrated experience building or maintaining large-scale design systems or component libraries

Deep knowledge of web performance optimization techniques and familiarity with tools like Webpack and Vite

for build optimization

Strong commitment to web accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1) with experience implementing and testing

accessible components

Proven track record of successfully hiring, mentoring, and growing engineering teams; experience with

performance reviews and career development

Excellent communication skills and ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders without formal authority

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Experience with Next.js and server-side rendering optimization

Background in mentoring junior/mid-level engineers or leading technical initiatives from conception to

delivery

Familiarity with modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind CSS and CSS-in-JS solutions

Experience with frontend testing frameworks and testing best practices (Vitest, Testing Library, Playwright)

Background in open-source contribution or community engagement within the frontend ecosystem

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

React, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Webpack, WCAG 2.1 Accessibility Standards, Web Performance

APIs & Lighthouse, Testing Library & Vitest, Storybook

W E O F F E R

Competitive salary and equity package with annual bonus

Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with company coverage

Professional development budget ($3,000/year) for courses, conferences, and certifications

 Flexible hybrid work model (3 days in-office, 2 days remote)

Generous PTO policy (20 days) plus 10 company holidays

Parental leave (12 weeks paid for primary caregiver, 4 weeks for secondary)

Mental health support including subsidized therapy and wellness programs

Home office stipend and equipment allowance

T O A P P LY

Submit your resume, cover letter, and links to your work (GitHub profile, portfolio, or design system examples)

via our careers page at prismuiabs.com/careers. Please include specific examples of teams you've led, technical

initiatives you've driven, and your approach to mentoring engineers. We review applications on a rolling basis.
